mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM review
AND title LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND content LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND writer LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, title, content, address, user_id, point, review_status, created_at FROM review
AND title LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND content LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND writer LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageable.pageSize} OFFSET #{pageable.offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (title, content, address, user_id, point, review_status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{address}, #{userId}, #{point}, #{reviewStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, address, user_id, point, review_status, created_at, updated_at, user, pros_list, cons_list, file_list, reply_list FROM review WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, address = #{address}, point = #{point}, review_status = #{reviewStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
